text:
if [[ "${SCM_GIT_GITSTATUS_RAN:-}" == "true" ]]; then
			untracked_count="${VCS_STATUS_NUM_UNTRACKED?}"
			unstaged_count="${VCS_STATUS_NUM_UNSTAGED?}"
			staged_count="${VCS_STATUS_NUM_STAGED?}"
		else
			IFS=$'\t' read -r untracked_count unstaged_count staged_count < <(_git-status-counts)
		fi

if [[ "$CTTYPE" == "0" && -d /dev/dri ]]; then
  chgrp video /dev/dri 2>/dev/null || true
  chmod 755 /dev/dri 2>/dev/null || true
  chmod 660 /dev/dri/* 2>/dev/null || true
  $STD adduser "$(id -u -n)" video 2>/dev/null || true
  $STD adduser "$(id -u -n)" render 2>/dev/null || true
fi

for i in ${!CTID_MENU[@]}; do
  [ "${CTID_MENU[$i]}" == "$CTID_FROM" ] &&
    CTID_FROM_HOSTNAME=$(sed 's/[[:space:]]*$//' <<<"${CTID_MENU[$i + 1]}")
  [ "${CTID_MENU[$i]}" == "$CTID_TO" ] &&
    CTID_TO_HOSTNAME=$(sed 's/[[:space:]]*$//' <<<"${CTID_MENU[$i + 1]}")
done

for i in ${!CTID_MENU[@]}; do
  [ "${CTID_MENU[$i]}" == "$CTID_FROM" ] &&
    CTID_FROM_HOSTNAME=$(sed 's/[[:space:]]*$//' <<<${CTID_MENU[$i + 1]})
  [ "${CTID_MENU[$i]}" == "$CTID_TO" ] &&
    CTID_TO_HOSTNAME=$(sed 's/[[:space:]]*$//' <<<${CTID_MENU[$i + 1]})
done

if [[ -f "$CONF_FILE" ]]; then
  conf_exclude=$(grep -oP '^\s*EXCLUDE\s*=\s*\K[0-9,]+' "$CONF_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
  IFS=',' read -ra conf_ids <<<"$conf_exclude"
  for id in "${conf_ids[@]}"; do
    id="${id// /}"
    [[ -n "$id" ]] && excluded_containers+=("$id")
  done
fi

for i in {1..10}; do
    VM_IP=$(qm guest cmd "$VMID" network-get-interfaces 2>/dev/null |
      jq -r '.[] | select(.name != "lo") | ."ip-addresses"[]? | select(."ip-address-type" == "ipv4") | ."ip-address"' 2>/dev/null |
      grep -v "^127\." | head -1) || true
    [ -n "$VM_IP" ] && break
    sleep 3
  done

if [ -n "${OSS_FUZZ_CI-}" ]
then
  export FUZZTEST_EXTRA_ARGS="${FUZZTEST_EXTRA_ARGS} --local_ram_resources=HOST_RAM*1.0 --local_cpu_resources=HOST_CPUS*.65 --strip=always"
else
  export FUZZTEST_EXTRA_ARGS="${FUZZTEST_EXTRA_ARGS} --local_ram_resources=HOST_RAM*1.0 --local_cpu_resources=HOST_CPUS*.15 --strip=never"
fi

for tz in ZRH:Europe/Zurich PIT:US/Eastern \
            MTV:US/Pacific TOK:Asia/Tokyo; do
    ((n > 40)) || break
    times="$times ${tz%%:*}\e[30;1m:\e[0;36;1m"
    times="$times$(TZ=${tz#*:} date +%H:%M:%S)\e[0m"
    n=$((n - 10))
  done

for tz in ZRH:Europe/Zurich PIT:US/Eastern \
                              MTV:US/Pacific TOK:Asia/Tokyo; do
    ((n > 40)) || break
    times="$times ${tz%%:*}\e[30;1m:\e[0;36;1m"
    times="$times$(TZ=${tz#*:} date +%H:%M)\e[0m"
    n=$((n - 10))
  done
